# Screen Entries

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/figmaboundarydocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to Figma AI Agent Daemon Boundary](../figma-ai-agent-daemon-boundary.md)

| Node | Screen | Daemon boundary |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `153:12742` | 컴포넌트 참여자 드롭다운 | Consumes the accepted SaaS assignment after task/subtask target validation. It does not sort dropdown rows or decide participant UI sections. |
| `153:15931` | 댓글 소통 | Reports provider progress batches with thread identity and consumes stop/cancel commands polled from SaaS. It does not create rendered comments or keep client streams open. |
| `153:15935` | 추가 기획 내용 | Accepts only already-authorized task/subtask assignments. It does not extend assignment to project, milestone, intake, AI property filler, or mention surfaces. |
| `156:19307` | 메뉴바 | No executable daemon behavior. Menu navigation can open a screen that later reads SaaS/device data, but the daemon does not own route labels or availability. |
| `162:23090` | 런타임 설정페이지 | Owns local current-device lifecycle facts and executes accepted agent-bound lifecycle commands. SaaS owns the remote read model projected to the client. |
| `432:37336` | 에이전트 설정페이지 | Consumes the assigned runtime, selected model, and instruction snapshot during provider execution. It does not create, update, delete, timestamp, or validate saved agent records. |
| `134:6542` | 에이전트 추가 | No direct daemon mutation. The daemon only sees the resulting assignment/runtime values if the created agent is later assigned. |
| `432:35713` | 에이전트 목록 | No list rendering ownership. The daemon may contribute liveness evidence that SaaS projects, but it does not order, filter, or style agent rows. |
| `42:3014` | Wireframe - 온보딩 | Supplies runtime detection/liveness to onboarding screens and later consumes the assigned instruction/runtime/model. It does not own onboarding sequence or workspace selection. |
| `137:6746` | 돌아가는 AI 보여주기 | Owns provider binary detection and liveness evidence. It does not own the detected/not-detected labels, radio state, or row dimming. |
| `138:7389` | 에이전트 선택 | No fixture catalog ownership. Fixture selection creates a normal agent upstream; daemon only consumes that agent after assignment. |
| `432:46849` | Ex AI - 온보딩 순서 변경 메모 | No onboarding draft execution ownership. The revised order lets clients collect a local agent draft/configuration before runtime and workspace selection; daemon only consumes the final SaaS-authorized assignment/runtime/model/instruction snapshot after workspace_id and runtime_id are known. |
| `164:26969` | Frame 6350445 | No direct-setting form ownership. The daemon consumes only the final instruction/runtime/model snapshot after SaaS authorization. |
| `164:30192` | Frame 6350447 | No workspace selection ownership. Workspace-scoped agent creation happens upstream before daemon execution. |
| `164:30206` | 돌아가는 AI 보여주기 | Reports no selectable runtime when providers are absent/offline. It does not install providers or start a provider installation flow. |
| `435:60050` | 데스크탑앱 온보딩-런타임 감지 X | Supplies negative detection/liveness evidence only. It does not bundle, download, install, or update Claude/Codex/OpenClaw/Cursor. |
| `236:29749` | 웹 온보딩 | No web onboarding command ownership. The macOS app download can eventually launch a daemon artifact, but sign-up, terms, invites, and waitlist stay product/client facts. |
| `275:22731` | 런타임 설정페이지 엠티 | Contributes local liveness/detection facts when running. Empty-state install cards, Windows waitlist, and marketing consent are outside daemon execution. |

The executable entry catalog is [`entries.riido.json`](entries.riido.json).
